rule: Text decisions are canonical. No visual variant becomes a master reference without an explicit asset decision.

primary.name: Rico Bassmann
primary.summary: 20-year-old innocent village boy and audience POV

alternate.name: Ricco
alternate.summary: late-20s-to-mid-30s chaotic musician and overwhelmed new resident

decision.summary: 24-year-old rural newcomer, aspiring DJ and musician, innocent audience POV plus creative chaos.
Single soft-spoken ex-leftist housing antagonist with KeepCup, keychain and moralised fee language.

primary.name: Kralle
primary.summary: Görli-Clan boss and harsh Kiez judge

alternate.name: Don Miau
alternate.summary: silent house cat who behaves like the real owner

decision.summary: Silent house boss cat with Kralle's scarred authority, fully cat-like and without human speech.

alternateOnly.name: Jule
alternateOnly.summary: Politicises everyday rules and uses group language as power. No direct duplicate in the primary 13-character library.

decision.pilotFunction: Active in beat seven: Gemeinschaftsküche and house-rule logic.
